name: rootly-mcp
description: Incident management, on-call scheduling, and intelligent analysis powered by Rootly.

metadata.short_description: Incident management, on-call scheduling, and intelligent analysis powered by Rootly
metadata.mesh_description: Provides incident management, on-call scheduling, and intelligent analysis. It enables users to streamline incident response workflows, automate on-call rotations, and gain insights into incident trends. Connects to Rootly's platform for comprehensive incident lifecycle management, from detection and alerting to post-mortem analysis. Perfect for SRE and DevOps teams managing complex incident response processes.
